name: Lucas Lopes
review:
Going through the visa process, especially with a deadline hanging over us, was one of the most stressful experiences I’ve faced — and Gilmara made an enormous difference in getting us through it.

From the start, she was straightforward and honest. She didn’t sugarcoat the challenges, but she also didn’t leave us guessing — every step was explained clearly, so we always understood where things stood and what came next. That clarity alone took a huge weight off my shoulders.

Our case wasn’t simple, and there were moments of real uncertainty. Gilmara never treated it as routine paperwork — she paid close attention to the details, answered our questions promptly, and made sure nothing was overlooked. It was clear she genuinely cared about the outcome, not just for the sake of the case, but for us as people going through it.

What I appreciated most was that she made herself available when we needed her, especially during the tighter, more stressful moments. That kind of responsiveness matters enormously when you’re dealing with something as high-stakes as a visa.

I’d recommend Gilmara and the team at Campos Law Practice to anyone looking for a lawyer who combines real expertise with honesty and genuine care. Thank you, Gilmara, for everything you did to help us get here.

name: Lara B
review:
There are moments in life when having the right professional by your side makes all the difference, and for me and my partner, Gilmara was exactly that person.

Our visa situation was complex, stressful, and at times emotionally overwhelming. From our very first conversation, Gilmara treated us with kindness, respect, and genuine care. She never gave us false hope or unrealistic promises. Instead, she kept us grounded, explained every step clearly, and helped us understand both the opportunities and the challenges ahead.

What impressed us most was her dedication. Our case required significant attention and careful handling, and Gilmara consistently went above and beyond what we expected. She invested an incredible amount of time into our application, always making herself available to answer questions, provide guidance, and ensure that every detail was addressed properly.

Beyond her expertise and professionalism, what truly sets Gilmara apart is that she genuinely cares about her clients. Throughout the process, we never felt like just another file on her desk. We felt supported, heard, and reassured during one of the most important and stressful periods of our lives.

The outcome we achieved would not have been possible without her persistence, knowledge, and commitment. We will always be grateful for everything she did for us.

If you are looking for an immigration lawyer who is not only highly skilled but also compassionate, honest, and deeply committed to her clients, I wholeheartedly recommend Gilmara and her team at Campos Law Practice.

Thank you, Gilmara, for going above and beyond for us. Your work has made a real difference in our lives, and we are incredibly grateful.

name: J&L Jong
review:
Gilmara is absolutely amazing
She's so patient and genuinely cared about my case.

Legal matters can be so stressful, but she made the whole process completely hassie-free. What really helped was her in-depth knowledge of international laws and understanding of regulations in different countries.

Plus, she always replied to my emails so quickly.

Gilmara really looks after her clients and looks into every detail. Definitely the best choice out there. Have already recommended her to my family and mates.

name: Mariana Sharpe
review: I had an amazing experience with Campos Law. They made a really stressful immigration process feel manageable. Clear advice, quick responses, and they genuinely cared about my case. Would 100% recommend if you want someone trustworthy and on your side.

name: Caroline Andrade
review: I’m very grateful for Gilmara’s work and support throughout my entire process. She was always professional, organized, and very attentive, making sure I understood each step along the way. This journey required a lot of patience and trust, and having someone as dedicated as her made everything much easier. I truly appreciate all her effort and would definitely recommend her services.

name: Nurit Faingold
review:
I had an excellent experience working with this lawyer. From the very first consultation, she was very professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in my case. Every step of the process was explained clearly, timelines were realistic, and all my questions were answered promptly and thoroughly.

What truly sets her apart is her attention to detail and dedication. Gilmara treated my case with care and urgency, which gave me great peace of mind during what can be a stressful process. Thanks to expertise and guidance, my visa process went smoothly and successfully.

I highly recommend this lawyer to anyone looking for reliable, trustworthy, and highly competent legal support with visas and immigration matters.

name: Tiago Schmidt
review: Highly recommend this lawyer for visa and immigration matters. Professional, knowledgeable, and very responsive throughout the entire process. Everything was clearly explained and handled efficiently, which made the visa application smooth and stress-free. Truly reliable and supportive legal service.

name: Luis Fernando Salazar Alves
review: I met Gilmara during a very difficult time after a visa refusal. From the very beginning and throughout the entire process, she proved to be a highly dedicated professional, fully committed to delivering the best possible outcome for her client. She was able to reassure me and develop a strategy to overturn the immigration decision through an appeal at the ART. We won the appeal in a record time of approximately two months, and after another month the visa was approved in line with the strategy we had outlined. I am very grateful for the work she did, and I highly recommend her to anyone who needs the support of an excellent professional.

name: Bruna Romano
review:
Highly recommend this firm for visa and immigration matters. The service was professional, efficient, and extremely well organised from start to finish. Communication was excellent, everything was clearly explained, and the entire process was handled with care and precision.

I felt fully supported throughout my application and always knew exactly where things stood. Gilmara was truly reliable and knowledgeable through it all.

name: Bruna Douek
review: Super reliable and transparent. I'm thankful to have found Gilmara's services, I felt complete support through my entire process.

name: Deborah DeRosa
review: Very professional! Clear advice was provided and I would use their services again!
